headline: Datadog Appoints Dominic Phillips to Its Board of Directors
summary: NEW YORK, March 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc., (NASDAQ: DDOG), the leading AI-powered observability and security platform for cloud applications, today announced the appointment of Dominic Phillips to its Board of Directors. “As AI compounds complexity for businesses across the globe, Datadog’s vision for driving autonomy while providing full-stack visibility and security across all applications stands out in the industry,” said Phillips. “I’m looking forward to bringing my expertis

headline: Datadog And Sakana AI Partner To Deepen Enterprise AI Observability
summary: Datadog (NasdaqGS:DDOG) announced a new partnership with Sakana AI focused on joint research and product work in enterprise AI. The collaboration targets AI powered observability and applications for large enterprises, starting in Japan with plans to expand globally. The partnership is aimed at helping customers handle AI adoption and production challenges at scale. Datadog enters this agreement with Sakana AI as a company already known for cloud observability, now looking to deepen its...

headline: Datadog (DDOG) Valuation Check After Sakana AI Partnership And Renewed Confidence In Enterprise AI
summary: Datadog (DDOG) is back in focus after announcing a partnership with Sakana AI, fresh commentary from Nvidia’s CEO on AI’s role in software, and ongoing work to deepen AI across its observability platform. See our latest analysis for Datadog. Despite the fresh AI partnerships and headlines, Datadog’s 7 day share price return of 9.11% sits against a 30 day share price return of 13.42% decline and a 90 day share price return of 28.45% decline, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 46.20%...

headline: Do Options Traders Know Something About Datadog Stock We Don't?
summary: Investors need to pay close attention to DDOG stock based on the movements in the options market lately.
